scripts.dev:all: npm run build -w @loopad/shared && concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev -w @loopad/api-server" "npm run dev -w @loopad/web-client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @loopad/shared && npm run build -w @loopad/api-server && npm run build -w @loopad/web-client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @loopad/shared && npm run build -w @loopad/shared && npm run typecheck -w @loopad/api-server && npm run typecheck -w @loopad/web-client
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build
